headline: Wells Fargo Hires $1.5 Billion Pennsylvania Team From Morgan Stanley
summary: The Bartoli Private Wealth Management Group is the third billion-dollar team to join Wells Fargo this month.

headline: How The Evolving Story On Wells Fargo (WFC) Is Shaping Its Fair Value Outlook
summary: The fair value price target for Wells Fargo has been adjusted to US$96.63 from US$96.17, a move of about 0.5% that keeps the headline target essentially in the same range. Behind that small change is a busy period of analyst activity, with target cuts, rating shifts, and a handful of upgrades all influencing how research teams are thinking about where the stock should trade on updated earnings work. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifts and what to watch as the narrative...

headline: Citi Stock Falls. Bank Lifts Key Financial Target as Investor Day Gets Underway.
summary: Citigroup  boosted a key profitability target on Thursday, a move that was widely expected as the bank’s investor day event was getting underway at its New York headquarters.  Shares were down 3% in premarket trading, however, as investors appeared underwhelmed by the figures.  Citi said it would target return on tangible common equity, or RoTCE, between 11% and 13%, excluding the financial impact of its Banamex stake sale, for next year and 2028.
